title: Exact Rational Inner Product Space Checks

solver_reuse.target: inner-product bad negative-norm QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact quadratic-form replay computes norm_square = -1 for a nonzero vector, but the malformed row claims norm_square > 0.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-dimensional inner-product rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep general Cauchy-Schwarz, Riesz representation, Hilbert projection, adjoints, and spectral theorem statements in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed rational inner-product, Gram-matrix, projection, and Gram-Schmidt rows as deterministic exact-rational obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over finite-dimensional matrices and vectors.
Route rejected finite positivity rows through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence once exact replay computes the bad norm square.
Keep general Cauchy-Schwarz, Riesz representation, orthonormal-basis, Hilbert-projection, and complete Hilbert-space theorems under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
